title: Writing a GMP Audit Report That Drives Change
alt: Five stages of writing an effective GMP audit report

items.label: Set scope and basis
items.desc: State what was audited, the standard, dates and exclusions.

items.label: Structure the report
items.desc: Scope, team, executive summary, graded findings, conclusion.

items.label: Write specific findings
items.desc: State requirement, observation and gap; anchor records in ALCOA+.

items.label: Grade by patient risk
items.desc: Critical, major or minor, consistently per ICH Q9.

items.label: Turn findings into CAPA
items.desc: Split correction from corrective action; make commitments verifiable.

items.label: Stand up to inspection
items.desc: Plain, evidenced language that withstands MHRA scrutiny.
